reforms.description: The government aims to improve financing of tertiary education to support innovation and growth by enhancing the quality and relevance of higher education to better align with labor market needs. This includes ensuring that subsidies for failing institutions are conditional on rapid improvement and prioritizing university positions in science and technology to enhance economic growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving education quality and alignment with labor market needs is expected to enhance human capital and innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the financing and quality of tertiary education.
reforms.source_quote: The Science, Technology and Innovation Policy Strategy focuses on this issue. Financing of university positions in science and technology receives more priority than previously.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has endorsed action plans aimed at developing knowledge-based, technology-intensive sectors, focusing on high-value industries such as automotive, logistics, pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, and ICT. This includes prioritizing the allocation of finance to subject areas conducive to innovation and enhancing collaborative links between research institutions, schools, universities, and the business community.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Focusing on high-value industries and enhancing collaboration is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the approach to sectoral R&D and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Increase research and development intensity and strengthen collaborative links between research institutions, schools, universities and the business community.

reforms.description: The housing loan subsidy programme was initiated to improve the quality and increase the size of the housing stock, providing interest subsidies and cash grants for first-time home ownership.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving housing quality and accessibility can enhance economic stability and growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been successfully implemented since its initiation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in housing support policy.
reforms.source_quote: The state subsidy programme for housing loans started in 2000 with the purpose to improve the quality and increase the size of the housing stock.

reforms.description: To restore sustainable growth, Hungary is advised to promote innovation policies as part of a broader structural reform agenda aimed at increasing productivity and efficiency across various sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of promoting innovation policies is ambiguous without specific details on implementation.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation has been made but not yet acted upon.
reforms.importance_rationale: This is a general recommendation rather than a specific reform.
reforms.source_quote: To increase productivity, innovation policies should be promoted.

reforms.description: The government introduced guarantee programmes, direct lending through the development bank, interest subsidies, and participation in venture companies to stabilize financing for SMEs amid deteriorating credit market conditions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Stabilizing financing for SMEs is crucial for maintaining economic activity and fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The support measures have been successfully implemented since their introduction.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform provides significant support to SMEs but is not a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The government has introduced guarantee programmes, direct lending through the development bank, interest subsidies and participation in venture companies to address the need for stable financing amid deteriorating credit market conditions.
